description: Gente Nueva is a large group of well-trained gunmen serving as an elite armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel. Founded in 1995 in Sonora, Mexico, it was created to counter the Juárez Cartel's influence in northwestern Mexico. The group has been involved in drug trafficking, kidnapping, and murder, and has engaged in a prolonged turf war with the Juárez Cartel and its enforcer wing, La Línea. As of 2012, Gente Nueva and the Sinaloa Cartel had emerged victorious in the conflict.

country_links.evidence_quote: for the control of the smuggling routes to the United States
country_links.context: Gente Nueva controls smuggling routes to the United States and the El Paso–Juárez corridor is used to traffic cocaine into the U.S.
